place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Beachfront Five-Bedroom Estate Villa with 21m Lap Pool & Tennis, Pantai Lima
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa — the largest pool villa on its private Pantai Lima estate, spanning 3,270 m² with panoramic river, sea and rice-field views, a 21m lap pool and shallow kids' pool, a beachside massage pavilion and shared night-lit tennis, fully staffed with a private chef, car and driver.
detail:
Spread across 3,270 m² and three pavilions, the villa sleeps up to ten in five en-suite bedrooms. A ground-floor room in the main house looks onto the pool, two upstairs open to ocean or rice-field views, and two further rooms sit in their own building about ten metres off for extra quiet. Beds range from kings to twins and queens, several with daybeds, balconies and outdoor bathrooms with soaking tubs, all framed by garden and water.

Outside, a 21m lap pool stretches beside a shallow pool for younger swimmers, with a massage pavilion set where the lawn gives way to sand and open sea. A home cinema seats up to twenty under a wall-filling screen, and the estate's all-weather tennis court, lit for night play, is shared among neighbours. A yoga deck and generous poolside lounging round out the grounds, which can host gatherings of up to a hundred.

The standard nightly rate comes fully staffed: a villa manager, housekeeping, attendants, a gardener and overnight security, plus a private chef fluent in Western, Indonesian and Asian menus and a car with driver for daily runs. Canggu, Pererenan and Seseh surf breaks all lie a short drive off, while the beach begins at the garden's edge.
